name: Pretzels
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yeast; Active, Dry                  4 cups Flour; Unbleached
1 1/2 cups Water, Warm, 110-120 Degrees        1 large Egg, Beaten
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Add salt and sugar to the yeast mixture.
3. Blend in flour and knead dough until smooth (about 7-8 minutes).
4. Cover and let dough rise until doubled in bulk.
5. Punch down the dough.
6. Cut into small pieces and roll into ropes.
7. Twist ropes into pretzel shapes and place on a greased cookie sheet.
8. Brush pretzels with egg using a pastry brush.
9. Sprinkle with coarse salt.
10. Allow pretzels to rise until almost doubled in bulk.
11. Bake at 425°F for 10-15 minutes or until browned.
12. Best if eaten immediately; store in an airtight container if not.
Makes 12, 6-inch pretzels.
